text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Now, for the results!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What, you ask? The fan votes for the<n>Arima Kinen
are about to be<n>announced on TV, dear Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My goal... is to break through to the<n>top by a
landslide!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I can ill afford to fall behind the<n>generation of yore
in any facet,<n>including popularity.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sure you did great, Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto is here to watch as well.<n>The results
are about to be revealed...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Next up, the votes for T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Da-dum-da-dum-da-da-da!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O's total comes out to...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
93,217 votes! Her spot in the Arima<n>Kinen is
secured!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh... Oh... Ooohhh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I've done it... I've done it! Haaah hah<n>hah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I should share my elation with all my<n>adoring
subjects!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Aaah ha ha hah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ayabe! Ha ha ha, I say!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
What the?! Would you stay out of my<n>room,
please?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: After running around in an explosion<n>of joy...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer, call a press conference.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it obvious? To announce my<n>readiness to run
in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I get a space prepared to hold the<n>press
conference.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... While I highly doubt it, you<n>don't believe
I'm setting myself up<n>for disappointment, do you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I know it's hard to believe. Suddenly,<n>though, I'm
remembering what<n>happened after my debut race.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I had full confidence in my<n>prominence at the time,
but only a<n>single reporter bothered to attend.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah... It was so nice and quiet.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No, Doto. That was not my intent!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The thought comes to me every now<n>and then.
Maybe all this glory I see...<n>is merely a
fancy—something dreamt<n>up by a king in the midst
of summer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps this dream will become a<n>nightmare once
I open that door... to a<n>barren, empty hall.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... How unlike me—to become<n>frozen and
fearful of my dreams...
choice_data_list: Should I... open the door for you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, I shall do it. After all, I wish for you<n>to always
see me in a dignified light.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Expel the nightmare! How could all<n>the glory and
admiration I've<n>received be a mere dream?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, let the gates open!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Creeeak!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyeeeee!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her fears turn out to be unfounded.<n>The
conference room is filled with<n>people, people, and
more people.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Reporters with nothing but praise for<n>T.M. Opera O
are packed into the room<n>like sardines.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh, hehehe... How wondrous I feel.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She would usually be cackling about<n>now. But in a
rare turn of events, she<n>simply chuckles.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Looking back, there was only one<n>reporter at my
first conference, and<n>my dinner show failed to
attract<n>anyone.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But gaze upon this now. See how<n>many people
have come, all for me.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on qualifying for the<n>Grand Prix,
Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
You're looking as good as ever! Say<n>something to
your fans!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This... This is what I've beenpursuing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sniffle How... unbecoming... for theOverlord to shed tears.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The turnout must be deeply moving<n>for her. She
appears incredibly happy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O, would you like more eye<n>drops?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Of course! With haste, Doto.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: ...All an act.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Good evening to you all. And thank<n>you for taking
the time to gather at<n>this event.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've summoned you here so that I<n>might express
the extent of my<n>feelings on the overwhelming
support<n>I've received from my fan base.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It will be in the form of a four-part,eight-hour epic entitled, The Tale ofOpera O: Fury Upon Nakayama!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ughhh...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Unsurprisingly, that has the reporters<n>groaning, but
it seems the press<n>conference is a big hit
nonetheless.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. A great deal of<n>time has
passed since my debut...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But I've only come this far due to<n>your support.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So... I believe a small gift is in order.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, it's not yet ready. I<n>shall present it
to you in half a<n>month's time.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It will be the ultimate euphoria—victory<n>at the Arima
Kinen, as well as the<n>throne of greatest trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My efforts will grant you these gifts.<n>So, will you
wait for me... at that<n>special place?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The throne—the Centurial Overlord's<n>throne, to be
specific.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The winners' circle at the Arima<n>Kinen... That is the
special place<n>where I shall receive my crown!
